title: The Weekly Challenge - 149
task1_desc: Given an input `$N`, generate the first `$N` numbers for which the sum of their digits is a Fibonacci number.
task1_body: Given an input `$N`, generate the first `$N` numbers for which the sum of their digits is a Fibonacci number. ## Example f(20)=[0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 10, 11, 12, 14, 17, 20, 21, 23, 26, 30, 32, 35, 41, 44]
task2_desc: Given a number base, derive the largest perfect square with no repeated digits and return it as a string. (For base>10, use 'A'..'Z'.)
task2_body:
Given a number base, derive the largest perfect square with no repeated digits and return it as a string. (For base>10, use 'A'..'Z'.) ## Example: f(2)="1" f(4)="3201" f(10)="9814072356" f(12)="B8750A649321"
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 30th January 2022**.
